narrative:
Lancaster City 5-A (precinct in Fairfield County) has 758 registered voters, with 64.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
